summary: Iteration 4 smoke testing for History page, Reactions endpoint, and WS reaction broadcast. All targeted backend endpoints and frontend smoke checks pass. No regressions observed.
passed: GET /api/games?limit=5 -> 200, returns {games:[...]} sorted by finished_at desc (2 games visible)
POST /api/rooms/{code}/react with unknown player_id -> 404 'Player not in room'
POST /api/rooms/XXXXX/react with unknown room -> 404 'Room not found'
Home page renders history-link pointing to /history
/history route renders data-testid=history-page with Hall of Fame title
history-list contains 2 history-item-* entries (matching persisted games)
WS integration: opening /api/ws/{code}/{pid} then POST /react broadcasts {type:'reaction', player_id, name, emoji, ts} to connected client (confirmed emoji='🔥', name='WSTester')
No console errors on home or history pages
notes: Did not exercise FloatingReactions visual overlay nor haptic vibration patterns (haptic is documented no-op on desktop and was confirmed to throw no console errors). Regression of full gameplay loop (start/answer/round_result/finished/rematch/kick/settings) was not re-run in this iteration; prior iterations 1-3 covered them and no code paths in those endpoints were modified per diff context.
